hero.description: Our mission is to promote the well-being of our members through accessible financial solutions and community development.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Born from the solidarity spirit of alumni of Colegio Ysaty, our cooperative drives the economic and social development of its community and all those who share the values of collaboration and mutual growth.
about.solidarityText: Concrete actions that strengthen the community.
about.educationText: Workshops and content to improve financial health.

services.title: Our Services
services.savingsText: Flexible and secure options for your goals.
services.sportsText: Sports activities for the well-being and integration of our members.
